duration.value: 1 round/level or until discharged 1 round/level or until discharged This spell functions as stunning barrier , except as noted above, and it provides a +2 bonus to AC and on saving throws. It is not discharged until it has stunned a number of creatures equal to your caster level . description.value: You are closely surrounded by a barely visible magical field. The field provides a +1 deflection bonus to AC and a +1 resistance bonus on saves. Any creature that strikes you with a melee attack is stunned for 1 round ( Will negates). Once the field has stunned an opponent, the spell is discharged. Stunning Barrier, Greater
